announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: J.Kumar Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts: We are pleased to inform you that, J. Kumar-SDPL (JV), is in receipt of Letter of Acceptance from M/s. National Highways Authority of India, for the work: Construction of 4 lane (expandable to 8 lane) Expressway for the connectivity to proposed Vadhavan Port (from Vadhavan Port to Tawa Village on NH 48 (Design length=32.180 Km) under NH (O) in the State of Maharashtra on EPC Mode, for the total contract cost amounting to ₹ 2,360,00,00,000/‐ (Rupees Two Thousand Three Hundred Sixty Crores only).
announcements.ai_summary: J. Kumar-SDPL (JV) has received a Letter of Acceptance from M/s. National Highways Authority of India for the construction of a 4-lane (expandable to 8-lane) Expressway connecting Vadhavan Port to Tawa Village on NH 48 in Maharashtra. The total contract cost for this project, which is to be executed on an EPC Mode, amounts to ₹ 2,360,00,00,000 (Rupees Two Thousand Three Hundred Sixty Crores only). The design length of the expressway is 32.180 Km. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The intimation is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Easy Trip Planners Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 01, 2026, titled "EaseMyTrip Announces Strategic Collaboration with NSDC and Sanatan AI to Formalise India s Spiritual Economy Through National Entrepreneurship Initiative".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Easy Trip Planners Limited has announced a strategic collaboration with the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) and Sanatan AI, along with the Bhagva platform, to launch a national-level entrepreneurship initiative. This initiative, titled "1 Panchayat – 1 Pandit – SANATANAI Shop on Wheels by EMT," aims to formalize India's spiritual services economy. The program will train Pandits, Pujaris, and Sanskrit-trained youth as certified micro-entrepreneurs, providing them with structured training, service delivery standards, and access to financing. A key component is a mobile, EV-based "Shop on Wheels" unit at the Panchayat level, offering services like pooja bookings, religious travel planning, and virtual darshan. EaseMyTrip will enable religious and pilgrimage travel services through this decentralized, franchise-led network, targeting deployment across up to 2 lakh Panchayats over five years. This expansion aims to strengthen the company's presence in religious tourism and reach rural markets.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 01, 2026, titled "CleanMax and STT GDC India Scale Renewable Energy Partnership Beyond 130 MW to Power India s Sustainable, AI-Ready Digital Infrastructure".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited and STT GDC India have expanded their renewable energy partnership, adding 21 MWp of solar capacity to their existing wind-solar hybrid power supply for STT GDC India's data centres in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. This expansion brings the total renewable energy capacity across their joint ventures in Tamil Nadu and Maharashtra to over 130 MW. STT GDC India will also increase its contracted green energy capacity in captive mode, holding a 26% equity investment in the renewable energy project. This collaboration aims to provide reliable, round-the-clock hybrid power, supporting India's sustainable and AI-ready digital infrastructure, with STT GDC India targeting carbon neutrality by 2030 and CleanMax having approximately 42% of its 5.7 GW portfolio in the AI and data centre segment. The announcement was made on April 1, 2026.
